productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Grey Top
description: Composition Grey tunic top made of 70% modal and 30% polyester, sleeveless with a V-neck and a scarf made of similar material Wash care Delicate machine wash inside out in cold water at 30C with mild detergent Do not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dry Dry inside out flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Heightened style is what this tunic top from the united colors of benetton exudes. Perfect for those warm winter days, this top coupled with a scarf is designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort. Team this with slim Fit jeans, stilettos and long earnings for that cool chic look.Size and FitComfort fitThe model (height 5'.8 and chest 33") is wearing a size M
